details.reasoning: The implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements. It adds a complete json_path constraint feature to SGLang: (1) new constrained generation module (json_path_to_schema.py) with json_path_to_json_schema() function that converts JSONPath expressions to JSON Schema; (2) validation ensures generated output contains valid JSON with the specified path structure; (3) json_path is properly registered alongside existing constraints (json_schema, regex) across all layers - API, IR, interpreter, OpenAI protocol, and sampling params; (4) json_path identifier appears throughout IR definitions (SglSamplingParams, SglGen); (5) implementation follows established patterns - parameter passing mirrors json_schema, conversion happens during SamplingParams.normalize(), mutual exclusivity validation included, comprehensive error handling. The solution is elegant: converts json_path to json_schema at normalization time, minimizing downstream changes. Comprehensive unit tests verify tokenization, schema building, and error cases. All requirements met with high code quality.
